title: ipa-healthcheck bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[0.16-9]
- Don't rely on order in trust roles (RHEL-99531)

[0.16-8]
- Incorrect patch merged

[0.16-7]
- Warn in ipa-healthcheck if umask is not 022 (RHEL-67901)

[0.16-6]
- Check for krbLastSuccessfulAuth being enabled (RHEL-4957)

[0.16-5]
- Check expiration dates of user-provided certificates (RHEL-80670)
full_text:
[0.16-9]
- Don't rely on order in trust roles (RHEL-99531)

[0.16-8]
- Incorrect patch merged

[0.16-7]
- Warn in ipa-healthcheck if umask is not 022 (RHEL-67901)

[0.16-6]
- Check for krbLastSuccessfulAuth being enabled (RHEL-4957)

[0.16-5]
- Check expiration dates of user-provided certificates (RHEL-80670)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20746.html
